mnemonics: D - Distribute, E - Arrange, C - Compare, R - Repeat, E - Eliminate, A - Arrive, N - Normalize, D - Done, - Conquer
Dolphin Eats Continuous Rhubarb And Never Disrespects Elders Always Now Daily
keyPoints: Insertion Sort is a simple sorting algorithm with a time complexity of O(n^2)
It works by dividing the input array into a sorted and an unsorted region
Each element in the unsorted region is inserted into the sorted region at its correct position
This process is repeated until the entire array is sorted
The key to efficient insertion sort is avoiding unnecessary comparisons and swaps
It's suitable for small datasets and can be an effective tool in certain scenarios
